products.name: PILUK Classic Leather Tote Bag
products.description: Premium full-grain leather tote with spacious interior and two open side pockets. Sturdy double top handles with a 10-inch drop. Interior zip pocket + 2 slip pockets. Magnetic snap closure. Fits A4 documents and 15-inch laptop. Available in Nude, Black, and Tan.

products.name: PILUK Canvas Everyday Tote
products.description: Lightweight heavyweight canvas tote with a natural cotton lining and reinforced base. Perfect for daily errands, office, or grocery runs. Inner zip pocket keeps valuables safe. Folds flat for easy storage. Machine washable. 40x35x15cm.

products.name: PILUK Quilted Chain Shoulder Bag
products.description: Elegant diamond-quilted PU leather shoulder bag with gold-tone chain strap (adjustable & detachable). Flap closure with push-lock. Inner card slots + zip compartment. Compact 26x18x8cm size. Signature PILUK hardware. Perfect for evenings and weekend outings.

products.name: PILUK Structured Top Handle Bag
products.description: Sophisticated structured shoulder bag with rigid frame and single flat top handle. Optional long strap included. Zip-top closure with suede interior lining. 3 internal compartments. Gold hardware accents. Office to dinner transition piece. 30x22x12cm.

products.name: PILUK Satin Evening Clutch
products.description: Luxurious satin evening clutch with a delicate pleated front and silver-tone frame closure. Removable wrist strap. Interior mirror pocket. Fits phone, lipstick, cards, and cash. 22x12cm. Available in Blush, Champagne, Ivory, and Midnight Blue.

products.name: PILUK Pearl Embellished Clutch
products.description: Stunning faux pearl-encrusted hard-case clutch with magnetic snap closure and silver chain handle. Velvet interior with mirror inset. Limited edition festive design. Perfect for weddings, Eid, and formal events. 20x13x5cm. Handcrafted details.

products.name: PILUK Mini Crossbody Sling
products.description: Compact crossbody sling bag with adjustable wide strap (55–120cm). Top zip closure with two-way zipper. Front slip pocket for quick access. Soft vegan leather exterior. Lightweight 280g. Fits phone, cards, keys, and earbuds. Ideal for travel and everyday use.

products.name: PILUK Leather Crossbody Messenger
products.description: Full-grain leather crossbody messenger with flap-over buckle closure. Spacious main compartment fits 10-inch tablet. Front flap pocket + rear slip pocket. Padded adjustable shoulder strap. Bronze antiqued hardware. 32x24x9cm. Unisex styling.

products.name: PILUK Floral Canvas Backpack
products.description: Charming floral-print canvas backpack with adjustable padded straps and back panel. Main zip compartment fits 13-inch laptop. Two front zip pockets + water-bottle side pockets. Interior organizer slots. Anti-theft back pocket. 38x28x14cm.

products.name: PILUK Mini Leather Backpack
products.description: Chic mini leather backpack with top handle and padded adjustable straps. Converts to a shoulder bag. Interior has 3 compartments + card pockets. Front zip pocket. Drawstring + flap closure. Rose-gold hardware. 28x22x10cm. Ideal for day trips and college.

products.name: PILUK Slim RFID Leather Wallet
products.description: Slim bi-fold wallet with RFID-blocking technology to protect your cards. 6 card slots, 2 note compartments, and 1 ID window. Genuine split leather exterior in soft matte finish. Rose-gold edge stitching. Fits in any bag pocket. 10x9cm.

products.name: PILUK Zip-Around Card Purse
products.description: Compact zip-around card purse with 12 card slots, coin pouch, and note section. PU leather exterior with fabric lining. Dual-tone zipper pull with PILUK charm. 19x10cm. Fits inside any handbag easily. Available in Pink, Beige, Black, and Burgundy.

products.name: PILUK Felt Bag Organizer Insert
products.description: Premium felt bag organizer with 13 pockets including phone, pen, lipstick, card, and key loops. Transforms any tote into an organized bag. Lightweight 120g. Available in 5 sizes (S to XL) and 6 colors. Machine washable. Handles included for easy transfer.

products.name: PILUK Gold Chain Bag Strap
products.description: Detachable gold-tone metal chain bag strap with lobster-claw clasps. Compatible with most bags having D-ring hardware. 120cm length, adjustable. Link size 12x8mm. Converts your clutch or tote into a crossbody instantly. Tarnish-resistant plating.
